articles.description: Senators Elizabeth Warren and Ron Wyden sent letters to Howard Lutnick and Tether CEO Paulo Ardoino asking about a loan Tether reportedly made to Lutnick's family.

articles.title: A Polymarket-linked bet on the weather in France forecasts a major data issue
articles.description: The incident shows that as more real-world outcomes become tradable, the real bottleneck is not trading itself, but the integrity and certification of the data used for settlement, argues Hallali.

articles.title: Gemini eyes prediction market challenge to Kalshi, Polymarket, secures derivatives license; shares surge
articles.description: Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss' crypto exchange now holds licenses allowing it to expand into regulated derivatives and prediction markets, the fastest-growing sectors in crypto.

articles.title: Polymarket taps Chainalysis to bring Wall Street-level oversight to crypto prediction markets
articles.description: By partnering with Chainalysis to monitor its blockchain data in real-time, Polymarket is signaling to both users and regulators that it is serious about eliminating insider trading and market manipulation.

articles.description: Bakkt announced the deal in January, which was originally for 9.3 million shares, along with a corporate name change to Bakkt Inc.

articles.title: Bithumb scores a legal win in South Korea as six-month suspension is lifted by local judge
articles.description: South Korea's financial watchdog imposed a $24.6 million fine on Bithumb and partial suspension that came into effect last month.

articles.title: Strategy keeps STRC dividend at 11.5% as stock logs first monthly gain in nine
articles.description: STRC’s volume weighted average price of $99.76 for April kept the dividend steady for a third consecutive month.

articles.title: Bitcoin risks extended retreat as April rally was futures-driven: CryptoQuant
articles.description: Futures drove up Bitcoin's price in April while spot demand declined, which CryptoQuant warned has historically preceded extended price declines.
